name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: San Diego's Western Union Money Order Only, 600 W Grape St, CA, is a 24/7 money order and check cashing destination.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only at 600 W Grape St in San Diego operates 24 hours a day, seven days a week, making it an always-available resource for money transfers and check cashing. This standalone San Diego location is designed to serve customers at any hour without closures or limited availability. The facility handles money orders and check cashing transactions with straightforward, accessible service.

This San Diego, CA money order and check cashing center processes transactions at the 600 W Grape St address and can be reached at +1 619-501-9278 for any questions about services. The staff handles money orders, check cashing, and related services during all operating hours. Contact the location directly to confirm availability or discuss your specific financial service needs.

Residents of San Diego who need money orders or check cashing at unconventional hours will appreciate the 24/7 availability at this West Coast location. Bring a valid government-issued ID when visiting to complete any money order or check cashing transaction. This straightforward money order service provides a reliable option for time-sensitive financial needs throughout the San Diego area.
address: 600 W Grape St, San Diego, CA 92101

company_info.headquarters: 600 W Grape St, San Diego, CA 92101

pros: Extensive network of 100+ agent locations across US including Walmart, grocery chains, and bank partners for convenient access
Money Transfer Control Number (MTCN) system allows tracking of transfers and secure recipient pickup with ID verification
Serves both banked and unbanked populations with cash-based transactions at physical locations
Offers first international online money transfer fee-free to new customers
Provides multiple in-person payment options including cash, debit card, and credit card at select locations
Money orders available as trusted alternative to checks for secure fund transfers
Can register transfers online or via app to save time at physical location for payment
International money transfer capability with automatic local currency conversion at time of transfer
cons: Transfer fees and costs vary significantly by method, destination, and payment option with no transparent published pricing
Does not offer in-person currency exchange despite international transfer capability
Subject to processing delays for certain destinations (example: Orange Wallet in Cameroon currently experiencing delays)
Service hours vary by individual agent location requiring separate lookup for each location
Credit card acceptance inconsistent across agent locations, limiting payment flexibility for some users
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing cash-based money transfer without bank accounts
Individuals sending remittances domestically or internationally to family and friends
Customers preferring in-person service and cash payment over digital-only money transfer apps
Consumers needing bill payment services for utilities, rent, and car payments at local retail locations
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers who prefer in-person, cash-based money transfers and lack traditional bank accounts, with an extensive retail network making services widely accessible. The primary caveat is that transparent pricing requires using their comparison calculator before sending, as fees vary substantially by transfer method, destination, and location—making it essential to shop costs rather than assume standard rates.
services: Domestic money transfers at agent locations
International money transfers with currency conversion
Money order purchase and cashing services
Bill payment services (utilities, rent, car payments) at participating locations
Cash pickup from transferred funds at agent locations
Western Union Prepaid Visa Card services
Online transfer registration for faster in-person completion
Money Transfer Control Number (MTCN) tracking system
Direct bank account transfer option at select locations
In-person ID verification and fund pickup services
Location finder tool to identify nearby agent services
